---
name: Example SAD contribution
about: Propose a new worked example SAD for the library
title: '[Example] '
labels: example
---

## What project type does this example cover?

E.g., "Greenfield data platform on Databricks", "IoT ingestion pipeline", "SAP S/4HANA implementation".

## What depth and criticality tier?

- **Documentation Depth:** Minimum / Recommended / Comprehensive
- **Business Criticality Tier:** 1-5

## What fictional organisation?

Propose a fictional organisation name with character (not "Acme Corp" or "Contoso"). Keep it believable.

## What sections will it demonstrate well?

Which aspects of the ADS standard will this example particularly showcase? E.g.:
- Full threat model with STRIDE
- 6 R's migration classification
- Multi-cloud topology
- Regulatory compliance traceability

## Why is this example useful?

Which other examples would it complement? What real-world audience would find it most helpful?

## Do you plan to draft it yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I will open a pull request
- [ ] No, I'm proposing the idea for someone else to take on
- [ ] Not sure yet — open to discussion

Thank you for contributing!
